name: Gauge
description: A wall of instrument dials — on every redraw the needles swing to fresh readings with a springy overshoot.

code.style: --sweep: @rand(-120deg, 120deg); --dial: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2)); --pin: @p(var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 12%; border-radius: 50%; border: calc(36px / @Y) solid var(--dial); opacity: 0.9; transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 47.75%; bottom: 50%; width: 4.5%; height: 31%; border-radius: 99px; background: var(--pin); transform: rotate(var(--sweep)); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transition: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
